title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: NORTH EUGENE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 250 Silver Lane Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Students living in the 4J school district Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 813-3903 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 813-3903 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance plans. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH EUGENE HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
